prompt: 사용자 프로필 페이지를 만들어줘. 프로필 사진 업로드, 닉네임 변경, 비밀번호 변경 기능이 필요해. 백엔드 API도 같이.

assertions.name: concern-based-split
assertions.description: Todos are split by logical concern (e.g., backend vs frontend, or by feature domain), not arbitrarily

assertions.name: dependency-ordering
assertions.description: Files use numbered prefixes or naming that reflects execution order when dependencies exist

assertions.name: context-paragraph-present
assertions.description: Each todo has a context paragraph explaining WHY and HOW it fits the bigger picture

assertions.name: checklist-items-are-concrete
assertions.description: Each checklist item describes a specific implementable action with enough detail for a worker agent
